I SWEAR TO GOD, IF YOU LEAVE REVIEWS OR PUBLIC CHATS OF YOU DOING DESPICABLE THINGS TO HER, I WILL SEND A DEMON TO YOUR HOUSE TO SCREAM OBSCENITIES FOR HOURS ON END.

I LOVE THIS SONG 🎧

⬇️

Oh, she brings me to my knees / Genuflect like Mary Magdalene / They, they wanna burn me, Wanna crucify my name! / If they, they call it sin How come she loves me like a saint?

Emerson loves tattooing, she loves the way the machine feels in her hand. The way the men at her shop treat her like family. But what she loves more is that one girl who comes in and gets tattooed... Wait, love? No. Maybe like? Maybe... Aw, shit. Here we go again.

Emerson in the original version of this in my mind was ACTUALLY Sutton's love interest. But well, if user is... Let's just make Emerson a badass artist. I love Emerson, so much. She was also a badass in the original version and I freakin' love her so much!
